huffines-don.text: Don Huffines is a candidate for Texas Comptroller of Public Accounts, running with Republican.
Don Huffines's recorded background: Don Huffines, former state senator from the 16th district (2015–2019) and candidate for governor in 2022.
No public data in our set on Don Huffines's campaign finance totals (this office is not required to file with the FEC, or no filing was found).

eckhardt-sarah.text: Sarah Eckhardt is a candidate for Texas Comptroller of Public Accounts, running with Democratic.
Sarah Eckhardt's recorded background: Sarah Eckhardt, state senator from the 14th district (2020–present).
No public data in our set on Sarah Eckhardt's campaign finance totals (this office is not required to file with the FEC, or no filing was found).

base.summary: Texas Comptroller of Public Accounts race: Don Huffines, Sarah Eckhardt. This overview lists each candidate's party, background, and campaign finance where available in our data set.
base.caveats: Our data set for this race covers candidate name, party, incumbency, background summary, and (for federal candidates only) FEC campaign finance totals. We do not have recorded voting histories or issue-by-issue policy positions for these candidates in this data set; state executive offices generally do not file with the FEC, so campaign finance is not available for most of them here.

renter_young_worker.summary: For a renter young worker voter looking at the Texas Comptroller of Public Accounts race (Don Huffines, Sarah Eckhardt): our data set does not contain candidate-specific positions or voting records on housing costs, rent, or renters' protections for this race. Below is what we do have on each candidate's background and, where available, campaign finance.
renter_young_worker.caveats: We only show a connection to renter young worker concerns when a candidate's own recorded background in our data set names it directly (for example, a farming or small-business background). Where no such record exists, we say so rather than guess at a candidate's likely position.
